decisionReasons: passes generalization, holdout, stress, and profit gates

decisionReasons: passes generalization, holdout, stress, and profit gates

improvementCoverage.name: Leave-one-symbol-out validation
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as `leaveOneSymbolOut` group validation for every variant.

improvementCoverage.name: Leave-one-family-out validation
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as `leaveOneFamilyOut` group validation for every variant.

improvementCoverage.name: Failure-pattern library
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with train-learned loser feature edges and failure blocking.

improvementCoverage.name: Liquidity quality model
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with rel-volume, clean-volume, fake-spike penalties.

improvementCoverage.name: Volume intent model
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with volume quality, acceleration, and flow agreement.

improvementCoverage.name: VWAP gravity model
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with VWAP pressure minus extension/chase risk.

improvementCoverage.name: Candle anatomy scoring
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with close location, body quality, wick rejection.

improvementCoverage.name: Profit-after-cost scoring
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented in every metric via modeled PnL after costs.

improvementCoverage.name: Loss-cluster kill switch
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as route/symbol cooldown after clustered losses.

improvementCoverage.name: Specialist ensemble voting
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as independent component vote count.

improvementCoverage.name: Meta-classifier
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as final weighted take/skip score.

improvementCoverage.name: Forward/backtest gap penalty
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented through route forward-trust score when evidence exists.

improvementCoverage.name: Synthetic cost stress
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented with normal and deep-stress cost modes.

improvementCoverage.name: Champion fusion
improvementCoverage.implementation: Implemented as fused best-rule layer combining prior champion rules.
